te tengo un resumen para que me vayas indicando, estuve mirando la SPA mira. 

Esta la nos da un cookies con un name:
1. XSRF-TOKEN y un value encriptado,
2. laravel_session y un value encriptado

 
El endpoints GET:
Obtiene datos json, __https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/file/en.json__
 
Con una colección de datos como:
"trademark_search": "Trademark Search",
"nice_classification": "Nice Classification",
"my_trademark": "My Trademarks",
"favorite_trademark": "Favorite Trademark",
"bookmark": "Bookmark",
"useful_link": "Useful Link",
Mas...
 
Este endpoints:
__https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/api/v1/web/get-setting__
 
Solo optiene estos datos: {
"success": true,
"message": "Success.",
"data": {
"trademark_search": "1",
"company_search": "1",
"web_logo": null,
"ts_icon": null,
"nc_icon": null,
"mt_icon": null,
"fav_icon": null,
"gi_icon": null,
"md_icon": null,
"color_code": null,
"country_map_file": "file/68c398b44118b.json"
}
}
 
 
Y este endpoints: __https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/file/68c398b44118b.json__
 
Trae datos como
{
"AF": "Afghanistan",
"OA": "African Intellectual Property Organization (OAPI)",
"AP": "African Regional Intellectual Property Organization (ARIPO)",
"AL": "Albania",
"DZ": "Algeria",
"AD": "Andorra",
"AO": "Angola",
"AI": "Anguilla",
"AG": "Antigua and Barbuda",
"AR": "Argentina",
"AM": "Armenia",
"AW": "Aruba",
"AU": "Australia",
"AT": "Austria",
"AZ": "Azerbaijan",
 
Mass...
 
Y este es post: __https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/api/v1/web/trademark-search__ 
Retorna un Status Code
200 OK con Remote Address
45.201.151.197:443
 
set-cookie
XSRF-TOKEN=AIwGG9BKSenCIkR63lBGFblgIVwc9K8nlvngBLYq; expires=Fri, 27 Mar 2026 04:54:16 GMT; Max-Age=7200; path=/; secure; samesite=lax
 
set-cookie
laravel_session=9fPw8iZI3gFJwFfqgduPTLwOwvSwKFDT5KBJIwtI; expires=Fri, 27 Mar 2026 04:54:16 GMT; Max-Age=7200; path=/; httponly; samesite=lax
strict-transport-security
max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 En la tarea  la SPA cuando hace las peticiones con el request de pust trademark-search  no aparecen los datos completos, lo podemos visualizar en Payload
 
 y tuve este error: 
{data: {page: "1", perPage: "20", search: {key: "all", value: ""},…}} data : {page: "1", perPage: "20", search: {key: "all", value: ""},…} advanceSearch : [,…] 0 : {type: "all", strategy: "contains_word", selectedValues: [], inputValue: "", connectingOperator: "OR"} connectingOperator : "OR" inputValue : "" selectedValues : [] strategy : "contains_word" type : "all" dateOption : "" filter : {province: [], country: [], status: [], applicationType: [], markFeature: [], classification: [],…} applicationType : [] classification : [] country : [] date : [] fillDate : [] markFeature : [] province : [] receptionDate : [] regisDate : [] status : [] isAdvanceSearch : "false" page : "1" perPage : "20" search : {key: "all", value: ""} key : "all" value : "" cuando hago la search aparece false: {data: {page: 1, perPage: "20", search: "[object Object]49633",…}} data : {page: 1, perPage: "20", search: "[object Object]49633",…} advanceSearch : [,…] dateOption : "" filter : {province: [], country: [], status: [], applicationType: [], markFeature: [], classification: [],…} applicationType : [] classification : [] country : [] date : [] fillDate : [] markFeature : [] province : [] receptionDate : [] regisDate : [] status : [] isAdvanceSearch : false page : 1 perPage : "20" search : "[object Object]49633" typeSubmit : "filter"
segun: 
🚀 3. Lo correcto (lo que esperan en la prueba)
👉 NO uses la SPA 👉 NO automatices el navegador (Selenium)
👉 haz esto:

```
Script en Python → API → JSON
```

ejemplo de uno que funciona cuando se hace el post.
https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/en/trademark-search/trademark-detail?afnb=KHT2026120973&mdftyp=biblio&callback_url=%2Ftrademark-search&callback_query=%7B%22tab%22%3A%220%22,%22page%22%3A%221%22,%22per_page%22%3A%2220%22,%22search%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22key%5C%22%3A%5C%22all%5C%22,%5C%22value%5C%22%3A%5C%22%5C%22%7D%22,%22filter%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22province%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22country%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22status%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22applicationType%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22markFeature%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22classification%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22date%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22fillDate%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22regisDate%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22receptionDate%5C%22%3A%5B%5D%7D%22,%22advance_search%22%3A%22%5B%7B%5C%22type%5C%22%3A%5C%22all%5C%22,%5C%22strategy%5C%22%3A%5C%22contains_word%5C%22,%5C%22selectedValues%5C%22%3A%5B%5D,%5C%22inputValue%5C%22%3A%5C%22%5C%22,%5C%22connectingOperator%5C%22%3A%5C%22OR%5C%22%7D%5D%22,%22is_advanced_search%22%3A%22false%22,%22date_option%22%3A%22last_year%22%7D

responde esto:
https://digitalip.cambodiaip.gov.kh/api/v1/web/trademark-detail?afnb=KHT2026120973&mdftyp=biblio
{
"success": true,
"message": "Success.",
"data": {
"id": "KHT2026120973",
"title": "SM",
"logo": true,
"owner": "Ms.XU YIPU",
"nice_class": "30",
"number": "KH/120973/26 (02-01-2026)",
"afnb_ori": "KH/120973/26",
"xml_detail": "{\"TradeMarkTransactionBody\":{\"TransactionContentDetails\":{\"TransactionIdentifier\":{},\"TransactionCode\":\"Filed Online\",\"TransactionSubCode\":\"Domestic Trademark\",\"TransactionData\":{\"TradeMarkApplication\":{\"TradeMarkDetails\":{\"TradeMark\":{\"RegistrationOfficeCode\":\"KH\",\"ApplicationNumber\":\"KH\\/120973\\/26\",\"ApplicationDate\":\"2026-01-02\",\"ApplicationLanguageCode\":\"en\",\"MarkCurrentStatusDate\":\"2026-01-29\",\"KindMark\":\"Individual\",\"MarkFeature\":\"Combined\",\"MarkImageDetails\":{\"MarkImage\":{\"MarkImageFilename\":\"ATTACHMENT\\/logo\",\"MarkImageFileFormat\":\"JPEG\",\"MarkImageCategory\":{\"CategoryKind\":\"Vienna\",\"CategoryVersion\":\"7\",\"CategoryCodeDetails\":{\"CategoryCode\":[\"26.01.11\",\"26.01.18\",\"26.01.22\"]}}}},\"GoodsServicesDetails\":{\"GoodsServices\":{\"ClassDescriptionDetails\":{\"ClassDescription\":{\"ClassNumber\":\"30\",\"GoodsServicesDescription\":\"Candies; candies [sweets]; candy bars; candy cake; candy canes; candy corn; candy mints; candy with cocoa; cakes; almond cake; almond cakes; brasadella [cakes]; buckwheat cakes; cake mixes; cake mixtures; cake powder; cake sprinkles; chocolate cakes; fruit cakes; iced cakes; millet cakes; mixes for cakes; mixtures for cakes; roll cake; rice cakes; moon cakes; tea cakes.\"}}}},\"ApplicantDetails\":{\"Applicant\":{\"ApplicantAddressBook\":{\"FormattedNameAddress\":{\"Name\":{\"FreeFormatName\":{\"FreeFormatNameDetails\":{\"FreeFormatNameLine\":\"Ms.XU YIPU\"}}},\"Address\":{\"AddressCountryCode\":\"KH\",\"FreeFormatAddress\":{\"FreeFormatAddressLine\":\"#34E1, Street 125, Phum 9, Sangkat Veal Vong, Khan Prampir Meakkakra, Phnom Penh\"}}}}}}}}}}}}}",

test idenpendiente con el archivo 

test.py


python3 test.py
200
